sources.relevance: Graduate admission criteria, graduate required documents, deadlines, placement/English testing, tuition, financial aid.

sources.title: AUT Graduation
sources.relevance: Graduation page lists awarded/ceremony categories including Master of Accounting, MBA, Executive MBA, Master of Science, and UoL LLM; used only as corroborating evidence, not primary program evidence.
